page_content:
HESP499 Independent Study (1-3 Credits)

A directed study of selected topics pertaining to human communication and its disorders.

Restriction: Permission of BSOS-Hearing & Speech Sciences department. Repeatable to: 6 credits if content differs.

HESP600 Instrumentation in Hearing and Speech Sciences (3 Credits) Types and principles of operation of electronic equipment used in the hearing and speech sciences.

Restriction: Must be in Clinical Audiology: Au.D. or Ph.D. (Doctoral) program; and permission of BSOS-Hearing & Speech Sciences department. Or permission of instructor.
